preToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" guard || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping guard'

postToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" polish || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping polish'
EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" polish || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping polish'
EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" observe || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping observe'
EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); SLUG=$(basename "$(pwd)" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g'); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" mem-observe --project "$SLUG" --agent cursor || true

sessionEnd.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" reflect || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping reflect'
